memberdef.type: Matrix2 static rotation(T angle) noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix2 static rotation(const Vector2< T > &from, const Vector2< T > &to) noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix
memberdef.definition: Matrix2 static rotation(T angle) noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix2 static rotation(const Vector2< T > &from, const Vector2< T > &to) noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix MR::Matrix2< T >::fromRows) (const Vector2< T > &x, const Vector2< T > &y) noexcept
memberdef.argsstring: )(const Vector2< T > &x, const Vector2< T > &y) noexcept
memberdef.name: fromRows

briefdescription.para: creates matrix representing rotation around origin on given angle

detaileddescription.para: creates matrix representing rotation that after application to (from) makes (to) vector constructs a matrix from its 2 rows

briefdescription.para: compute sum of squared matrix elements

inbodydescription.para: Calling sqrt this way to hopefully support boost.multiprecision numbers. Returning auto to not break on integral types.

memberdef.type: Matrix2< T > inverse() const noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix2< T >
memberdef.definition: Matrix2< T > inverse() const noexcept MR_REQUIRES_IF_SUPPORTED(std constexpr Matrix2< T > MR::Matrix2< T >::transposed
memberdef.name: transposed

briefdescription.para: returns a matrix that scales uniformly
returns a matrix that has its own scale along each axis

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector2< T > &x, const Vector2< T > &y) noexcept
memberdef.name: fromColumns

detaileddescription.para: constructs a matrix from its 2 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY ) into vectors ( x, y ) respectively

briefdescription.para: NOTE: We use std::declval() in the operators below because libclang 18 in our binding generator is bugged and chokes on decltyping a.x and such. TODO fix this when we update libclang.

memberdef.definition: Matrix2< decltype(std::declval< T >() - std::declval< T >())> operator-
memberdef.name: operator-

memberdef.type: Vector2< decltype(dot(std::declval< Vector2< T > >(), std::declval< Vector2< T > >()))>
memberdef.definition: Vector2< decltype(dot(std::declval< Vector2< T > >(), std::declval< Vector2< T > >()))> operator*
memberdef.name: operator*

memberdef.type: Matrix2< decltype(dot(std::declval< Vector2< T > >(), std::declval< Vector2< T > >()))>
memberdef.definition: Matrix2< decltype(dot(std::declval< Vector2< T > >(), std::declval< Vector2< T > >()))> operator*
memberdef.name: operator*
